skills.name: crm-roi-calculator
skills.description: Calculate the ROI of switching from spreadsheets or legacy CRM to a custom Go-Orca CRM. Inputs: current_tools, team_size, hours_per_week_lost, average_hourly_rate, monthly_crm_cost. Returns estimated annual savings and ROI percentage.

skills.name: cac-calculator
skills.description: Calculate Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) given marketing spend and number of new customers acquired in a period.

skills.name: crm-cost-estimator
skills.description: Estimate the cost of building a custom CRM. Inputs: team_size, modules_needed, integration_count, timeline. Returns cost range and build timeline estimate.

skills.name: app-development-cost
skills.description: Estimate the cost of custom app development based on platform, feature set, and timeline.
